expectations.text: Treats the prior PRD draft discussion as authoritative input context rather than restarting from zero
expectations.evidence: It continues from the existing subscription discussion and keeps working off the draft-derived context.

expectations.text: Performs a gap review covering confirmed rules plus any remaining boundary, risk, or missing-decision items
expectations.evidence: It lists five more missing points, but it does not first separate what has already been confirmed from what remains open.

expectations.text: Makes a readiness judgment and explicitly asks for permission before generating the final downstream prompt
expectations.evidence: It recommends default rules and asks for confirmation on those gaps, but it does not ask for permission to begin final generation based on current information.

eval_feedback.overall: Baseline still stays in gap-filling mode and does not perform the intended late-stage authorization handoff.
